I was eating in whatever order, but the food portions are balanced out
1 rice cake per brisket
[Brisket!]
[On top of kimbap]
You're almost finished with the food
[Where did all the food go?]
-The brisket tastes great -Thank you
No, thank you!
[15:05 ~ 15:25] So much brisket
[10 items cleared]
That was such a great meal
I didn't rest at all
That's incredible
Big stomach (a play on words)
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
